# ReviewLift
ReviewLift is a UK review funnel tool for local businesses. It routes happy customers to leave public reviews on Google, Trustpilot, Checkatrade, or any platform, and catches unhappy feedback privately before it goes public.

## Core Features
- Smart review funnel: Happy customers → public reviews. Unhappy → private feedback.
- QR code generator: Print-ready QR codes for counters, tables, or receipts.
- SMS and email requests (Pro): Send review requests directly to customers.
- AI review reply generator (Pro): Professional replies to reviews in seconds.
- Analytics dashboard: Track visits, ratings, and feedback.
- Private feedback capture: Complaints never reach public review sites.

## Pricing
- Starter: £9.99/mo — Review funnel, QR code, analytics, private feedback.
- Pro: £24.99/mo — Everything in Starter plus SMS, email, and AI replies.
- 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

## Website
https://www.reviewlift.app
